_comment: Synthetic ChromoFold ABI-v0 `cf_wavelet_view` metadata, derived from the invariants documented in ../chromoFold/include/chromofold/chromofold.h. This is the committed honest-degrade source-of-truth (SDD-400 / SDD-300 pattern) and the fixture the conformance seam checks. It is NOT a real `.cfwv` binary blob — that on-wire layout is the native session's to freeze (PROJECT_SYNC), and binding it before it is frozen is the divergence SDD-400 forbids. Sample corpus: token_count=8 over vocab=4.
